en-us.html:
True beauty lies outside of the conventional.

    Story

    392 AC - Kibble leaps from floating stone to suspended rock and launches himself in my direction. He drifts through the air as the fickle gravity carries him toward me. He's crackling with Mana, even though that's left his fur all disheveled like a ball of wool caught in a storm of static electricity. He has stored more than enough for us to stabilize the area. I catch him and give him a big cuddle, feeling his Mana overflow and pour into me. He places his paws against my nose to stop me from covering his muzzle with red lipstick and glitter. Oh, poor thing. Aren't you happy to see me? But I'm fully aware that time is running out. All this fizzing Mana is eager to be incarnated in the world. Yes, little one. Let's go, everyone on stage! It's showtime!

    Our hug is a release, an explosion. I let my spirit wander and let my imagination flow out of me like wine from a wineskin. The newly freed ideas swirl out of my psyche. It's like a detonation, a shock wave that spreads out for miles around. And all around, I feel reality changing, transforming under the will of my inspiration, which I deliberately let run wild. My imagination expresses itself and imprints itself, shaping the world as ideas and Mana blend, weave and tangle in a burst of energy. In reality, the cataclysm of our meeting is like a miniature Confluence, but one that's guided and controlled. And my goal is to ensure that anyone who comes into my territory will be captivated and inspired by its beauty. I think of silks, prints, flat areas of color and strong contrasts. Yes, I want everyone who sets foot here to feel like they've stepped inside a work of art!

blocks.text: True beauty lies outside of the conventional.

blocks.title: Story

He's crackling with Mana, even though that's left his fur all disheveled like a ball of wool caught in a storm of static electricity. He has stored more than enough for us to stabilize the area. I catch him and give him a big cuddle, feeling his Mana overflow and pour into me. He places his paws against my nose to stop me from covering his muzzle with red lipstick and glitter. Oh, poor thing. Aren't you happy to see me? But I'm fully aware that time is running out. All this fizzing Mana is eager to be incarnated in the world. Yes, little one. Let's go, everyone on stage! It's showtime!

Our hug is a release, an explosion. I let my spirit wander and let my imagination flow out of me like wine from a wineskin. The newly freed ideas swirl out of my psyche. It's like a detonation, a shock wave that spreads out for miles around. And all around, I feel reality changing, transforming under the will of my inspiration, which I deliberately let run wild. And my goal is to ensure that anyone who comes into my territory will be captivated and inspired by its beauty. I think of silks, prints, flat areas of color and strong contrasts. Yes, I want everyone who sets foot here to feel like they've stepped inside a work of art!

fr-fr.html:
La véritable beauté est celle qui existe en marge des conventions.

    Histoire

    392 AC - Kibble bondit de pierre flottante en rocher suspendu, et se catapulte dans ma direction. Il dérive dans l'air, tandis que la gravité facétieuse l'emmène jusqu'à moi. Il est crépitant de Mana, même si cela veut dire que son pelage est tout ébouriffé, comme une boule de poils en pleine tempête d'énergie statique. Il en a emmagasiné bien assez pour que nous puissions stabiliser la zone. Je l'attrape au vol et lui fais des câlins, sentant son Mana déborder et m'envahir. Il pose ses pattes contre mon nez pour m'empêcher de lui couvrir le museau de rouge à lèvres et de paillettes. Oh, pauvre bougre. Tu n'es pas heureux de me voir ? Mais je sais très bien que le temps est compté. Tout ce Mana grésillant vibre de s'incarner dans le monde. Oui, petit bonhomme. En piste, tous en scène ! Que le spectacle commence !

    Notre étreinte est une décharge, une déflagration. Je laisse mon esprit vagabonder et mon imagination se déverser en dehors de moi comme le vin d'une outre. Les idées ainsi libérées virevoltent hors de ma psyché. C'est comme une explosion, comme une onde de choc qui se propage à des lieues à la ronde. Et partout autour, je sens la réalité se modifier, se transmuer au gré de mon inspiration, dont j'ai délibérément lâché la bride. Mon imagination s'exprime, et s'imprime, façonnant le monde tandis qu'idées et Mana se mélangent, se tissent, s'enchevêtrent dans une bouffée pétaradante. En réalité, la conflagration née de notre rencontre est comme une petite Confluence, mais dont l'expression est guidée, maîtrisée. Et je compte bien faire en sorte que quiconque pénètre dans mon territoire soit subjugué et inspiré par sa beauté. Je pense à des soieries, à des estampes, à des aplats de couleur et de forts contrastes. Oui, je veux que tous ceux qui mettent un pied ici aient l'impression d'évoluer au sein d'une œuvre d'art !

blocks.text: La véritable beauté est celle qui existe en marge des conventions.
